description: The Italian Pasta Rule. Each Italian battalion must receive an additional 1 Water Point (Pasta Point) when Stores are distributed. A battalion not receiving its Pasta Point: (1) may not voluntarily exceed its CPA that Turn, and (2) if its Cohesion Level is -10 or worse, immediately becomes Disorganized as if it had reached -26. When such a unit later receives its Pasta Point, it regains its original Cohesion Level (the level before disorganization).

cases.description: Unit received Pasta Point and was not previously restricted: no change, no event
cases.rule_clause: each Italian battalion, when it receives its Stores, must receive an additional 1 Point of Water when Stores are distributed

cases.description: Unit receives Pasta Point after having been restricted; unit was active so no recovery needed: clear flag, no status change, no event
cases.rule_clause: As soon as such units get their Pasta Point, they regain the original Cohesion Level (i.e., the level they had before they disintegrated)

cases.description: Unit receives Pasta Point; was pasta-disorganized (cohesion -10, which triggered forced disorganization); cohesion level is genuine -10 (not genuinely -26): restore to active and emit recovery event
cases.rule_clause: As soon as such units get their Pasta Point, they regain the original Cohesion Level (i.e., the level they had before they disintegrated)
cases.note: The unit's true cohesion is -10 (not genuinely -26), so it was disorganized purely due to the Pasta Rule. On receiving the Pasta Point it regains its original cohesion level (-10) and is no longer treated as -26.

cases.description: Unit receives Pasta Point; was disorganized but cohesion is genuinely -26 (not pasta-caused): clear flag, keep disorganized, no recovery event
cases.rule_clause: As soon as such units get their Pasta Point, they regain the original Cohesion Level (i.e., the level they had before they disintegrated)
cases.note: Cohesion is genuinely -26 so the unit was already at the disorganization threshold independently of the Pasta Rule. Restoring the 'original Cohesion Level' (-26) still leaves the unit disorganized.

cases.description: Unit did not receive Pasta Point; cohesion 0 (not -10 or worse): set restricted flag, keep active, emit pasta_rule event, not forced-disorganized
cases.rule_clause: Any battalion-sized unit that does not receive their Pasta Point (one Water point) may not voluntarily exceed their CPA that Turn. Furthermore, Italian battalions not receiving their Pasta Point that have a Cohesion Level of -10 or worse immediately become Disorganized

cases.description: Unit did not receive Pasta Point; cohesion -5 (above -10 threshold): set restricted flag, keep active, emit pasta_rule event, not forced-disorganized
cases.rule_clause: Italian battalions not receiving their Pasta Point that have a Cohesion Level of -10 or worse immediately become Disorganized

cases.description: Unit did not receive Pasta Point; cohesion exactly -10 (at threshold): set restricted flag, force disorganized as-if -26, emit pasta_rule event, forced_disorganized=true
cases.rule_clause: Italian battalions not receiving their Pasta Point that have a Cohesion Level of -10 or worse immediately become Disorganized, as if they had reached -26

cases.description: Unit did not receive Pasta Point; cohesion -15 (worse than -10): set restricted flag, force disorganized as-if -26, same result as -10 case
cases.rule_clause: Italian battalions not receiving their Pasta Point that have a Cohesion Level of -10 or worse immediately become Disorganized, as if they had reached -26

cases.description: Unit did not receive Pasta Point; cohesion -10; unit was already disorganized before this turn: set restricted flag, no status change needed (already disorganized), emit pasta_rule event, forced_disorganized=false (no new disorganization occurred)
cases.rule_clause: Italian battalions not receiving their Pasta Point that have a Cohesion Level of -10 or worse immediately become Disorganized, as if they had reached -26
cases.note: The rule says units 'immediately become Disorganized'. This unit was already disorganized, so forced_disorganized=false because the status did not change as a result of the Pasta Rule firing.

cases.description: Unit did not receive Pasta Point; cohesion genuinely -26 and already disorganized: set restricted flag, keep disorganized, emit pasta_rule event, forced_disorganized=false
cases.rule_clause: Italian battalions not receiving their Pasta Point that have a Cohesion Level of -10 or worse immediately become Disorganized, as if they had reached -26
